Its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm, peeks out behind the calendar. The background has a warm sepia-toned early-2000s aesthetic with soft amber lighting and faded vintage color tones. no text
